zh.lifeSummary: 當Francis Knollys於1514年出生在英國奧可福爾時，他的父親Sir Robert Knollys33歲，母親Lettice Peniston29歲。他於1540年4月26日與Lady Catherine Carey結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1596年7月19日在他的家鄉享年82歲，埋葬在英國奧可福爾洛瑟費爾德 格斯。

nameMeanings.name: Knollys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Knowles
meanings: English: topographic name from Middle English knol(le) ‘knoll, hilltop’ (Old English cnoll) or from any of the many places (some lost) named with this word, for example Knowle (Devon, Dorset, Lancashire, Somerset, Warwickshire, and Yorkshire) and Knole (Kent, Sussex).
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Tnúthghail (see Newell ).
English: variant of Noel , often, with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Francis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of Italian Francesco , originally a vocabulary word meaning ‘French’ or ‘Frenchman’ (Late Latin Franciscus; compare Frank ). This was a nickname given to St Francis of Assisi ( 1181–1226 ) because of his wealthy father's business connections with France. His baptismal name was Giovanni . He had a pleasant, ordinary life as a child and young man, but after two serious illnesses, a period of military service, and a year as a prisoner of war in Perugia, he turned from the world and devoted himself to caring for the poor and sick. He was joined by groups of disciples, calling themselves ‘minor friars’ (friari minores). The main features of the Franciscan rule are humility, poverty, and love for all living creatures. The given name occurs occasionally in England as early as 1300 , and more frequently from the early 16th century, when there was a surge of admiration for, and imitation of, Italian Renaissance culture.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Francis Knollys was born in 1514, in Oxfordshire, England, his father, Sir Robert Knollys, was 33 and his mother, Lettice Peniston, was 29. He married Lady Catherine Carey on 26 April 1540. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 19 July 1596, in his hometown, at the age of 82, and was buried in Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Francis Knollys est né en 1514, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert Knollys, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Lettice Peniston, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Lady Catherine Carey le 26 avril 1540. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 19 juillet 1596, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 82 ans, et a été enterré à Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Francis Knollys 1514 in Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert Knollys 33 und seine Mutter Lettice Peniston 29. Er hat am 26. April 1540 Lady Catherine Carey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 19. Juli 1596 im Alter von 82 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Francis Knollys è nato il nel 1514 nel Oxfordshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Robert Knollys, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Lettice Peniston, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Lady Catherine Carey il 26 aprile 1540. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 19 luglio 1596, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 82 anni, e fu sepolto a Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, England.

ko.lifeSummary: Francis Knollys(이)가 1514년 영국 스퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Knollys(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Lettice Peniston(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1540년 4월 26일 Lady Catherine Carey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1596년 7월 19일 그의 고향에서 82세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스퍼드실르 로더필드 그리스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Francis Knollys nasceu em 1514, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert Knollys, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Lettice Peniston, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Catherine Carey em 26 de abril de 1540. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 19 de julho de 1596, em sua cidade natal, com 82 anos, e foi sepultado em Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Francis Knollys родился в 1514 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert Knollys было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Lettice Peniston, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Catherine Carey 26 апреля 1540 г. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 19 июля 1596 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 82 лет и был похоронен в местности ротирфиелд грис, оксфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Francis Knollys nació en 1514, en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert Knollys, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Lettice Peniston, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Lady Catherine Carey el 26 de abril de 1540. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 19 de julio de 1596, en su pueblo, a la edad de 82 años, y fue sepultado en Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.
